sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) a column, a pillar (Arab. عمُودُ, عِمَادُ), Jud. 16:25 , 26 Jdg 16:26 1Ki 7:2, seq. עַמּוּד הֶעָנָן the pillar of cloud, Exo 33:9, 10 Exo 33:10and עַמּוּד הָאֵשׁ the pillar of fire, Exo 13:22. Used of the pillars of heaven (very high mountains), Job 26:11 of the earth, ibid. 9:6.

(2) a platform, scaffold, 2Ki 11:14 23:3 .
